ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., 1AL, 1PG) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock market data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price reached during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_mapping_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_mapping_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index value */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the market index */,
  "change" TEXT /* Change in the index value from the previous day */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indices_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model.algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction is about */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" TEXT /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
